description: The BMW M2, produced from 2016, is the compact rear-wheel-drive M car. The original F87 used a 3.0-litre twin-turbo straight-six producing 365-405 bhp, while the G87 increased output to 460 bhp. The M2 CS and M2 Competition with their manual gearbox option are the most sought-after variants.
